scripts.check: pnpm --filter frontend check && cargo check --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
scripts.clean: cargo clean --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml && pnpm -r exec node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true })" && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('node_modules', { recursive: true, force: true })" && pnpm install
scripts.fix: pnpm -F frontend format && pnpm -F frontend lint --fix && cargo fmt --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --fix -- -D warnings
scripts.test: pnpm -F frontend test:unit --run && cargo test --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml
